name: baseline-v1-3-preregistered

riskAppetiteTransform.rationale: Continuous bounded mapping without hard clipping; VIX 20 is neutral and scale 7 preserves sensitivity across calm and stress observations.

selectionPolicy: No transform parameter, model parameter or gate threshold may change after train-gate evaluation.
evaluationPolicy: Generate the fixed candidate evaluation, bind its SHA-256 into a gate-v2 config, and inspect only the train-gate report unless eligible.
outerOosPolicy: No baseline, audit or NBER OOS report may be opened unless train gate v2 passes.
